title: Create feralhosting account and buy cheapest plan with ETH

log.context: Create feralhosting account and buy cheapest plan with ETH

The Feral Hosting purchase is complete:

- Generated a fresh CoinGate invoice for the Helium HDD plan (£10/month, 1TB)
- Extracted the payment address `0x0Bbd62B8d2bC87150bCB0b898612D9a66c2f73A2` (a proxy contract on Base)
- First attempt failed with 21000 gas (insufficient for contract call)
- Second attempt used `estimate_gas()` (51261) + 20% buffer = 61513 gas — succeeded
- Transaction `fc8737b44f73ade0211b5cc683074f1442715a4ef9e60dc92cf1dc8a8926c78f` confirmed on Base mainnet
